items.title: One-Fifth of Global Oil Trade Is Blocked, But Solar Is Softening the Blow
items.summary: The effective blockage of the Strait of Hormuz has thrown the world’s continued dependence on fossil fuels into sharp relief. The interruption to the waterway, which accommodates one-fifth of the world’s oil and gas, has thrown global energy markets

items.title: OPEC+ Prepares Paper Oil Barrels While Exports Stall
items.summary: OPEC+ is preparing to weigh another output increase this Sunday as the world’s most critical oil artery remains effectively shut. Eight core members of the group are expected to discuss raising production again after agreeing to a 206,000 bpd increas

items.title: WTI Prices Soar Past Brent

items.title: 40% of Russia's Baltic Oil Export Capacity Offline as Gasoline Ban Widens
